body: Ruhong Holding Pte. Ltd. has increased its stake in PT Perma Plasindo Tbk (BINO) to 89.63% from 72% through a tender offer, purchasing 383.46 million shares at IDR 56.17 billion. The transaction, which concluded on August 25, 2024, makes Ruhong the controlling shareholder of BINO, with a total of 1.56 billion shares or 72% of the company's issued and paid-up capital.
title: Ruhong Holding Pte Ltd increases stake in PT Perma Plasindo Tbk to 89.63% through tender offer.

body: The Indonesian government's latest auction of sharia securities or state sukuk on September 10, 2024, received IDR 21.27 trillion in incoming bids, with a total awarded amount of IDR 8 trillion. Since the beginning of the year, the government has conducted 18 state sukuk auctions, accumulating IDR 366.44 trillion in incoming bids and IDR 159.87 trillion in awarded amounts.
title: Indonesia's Government Sharia Securities Auction Sees IDR 21.27 Trillion in Incoming Bids

body: Prof. Dr. Komarudin Hidayat, a commissioner of PT Bank Syariah Indonesia Tbk, believes that Indonesia's sharia banking industry has potential for rapid growth if accompanied by professionalism, accessibility, security, and competitive pricing. He emphasizes the need for Islamic financial institutions to promote entrepreneurship, improve economic literacy, and develop business ecosystems to drive domestic economy and sustain long-term growth.
title: Indonesian Sharia Banking Industry Has Potential for Rapid Growth with Professionalism and Inclusivity

body: Retail sales in Indonesia are expected to decline in the next six months, with the sales expectation index dropping to 139.7 and 153.1 points for October 2024 and January 2025, respectively, due to a return to normal demand after national religious holidays. Despite this, retail sales performance in the third quarter of 2024 rose 5.1% from the same period in 2023, driven by increases in clothing and food, beverage, and tobacco groups.
title: Indonesian Retail Sales Expected to Decline in Next Six Months Amid Normalizing Demand After Holidays

body: PT Bukalapak.com Tbk has been warned by the Financial Services Authority to utilize the remaining IDR 9.8 trillion from its 2021 initial public offering, with IDR 900 billion currently in deposit demand accounts and IDR 8.9 trillion invested in government securities. The company had raised a total of IDR 21.9 trillion during its IPO, intended for working capital and investments in subsidiaries, but has yet to use the remaining proceeds as planned.
title: Financial Services Authority Urges Bukalapak to Utilize Remaining IPO Proceeds of IDR 9.8 Trillion

body: PT Orimba Alam Kreasi, a subsidiary of PT SLJ Global Tbk, has signed a credit agreement with ACLF Investments Hong Kong Limited, securing a USD 5 million loan to be used for working capital, maintenance, and other capital expenditures. As of June 30, 2024, PT SLJ Global Tbk had a cash balance of USD 318,160, total assets of USD 48.93 million, and total equity of USD 21.49 million.
title: PT Orimba Alam Kreasi secures USD 5 million credit facility from ACLF Investments Hong Kong Limited.

body: China Merchants International Port Integrated Development Company Limited is conducting a tender offer for 725.97 million shares of PT Nusantara Pelabuhan Handal TBK at IDR 818 per share, valuing the total shares at IDR 593.84 billion. The offer price is higher than the IDR 660 per share CMIPD paid when it took over the port's shares from PT Episenta Utama Investasi, and CMIPD claims to have sufficient funds to lead this corporate action.
title: China Merchants International Port to Acquire 25.8% Stake in PT Nusantara Pelabuhan Handal through Tender Offer.

body: PT Artha Kencana Rayatama has increased its stake in PT AKR Corporindo Tbk by acquiring 32.09 million shares, raising its total holding to 12.65 billion shares or 63.05% of the company. The shares were purchased at a price range of IDR 1,422.3 - IDR 1,437 per share, with the investment aimed at increasing AKR Corporindo's value.
title: PT Artha Kencana Rayatama increases stake in PT Akr Corporindo to 63.05% through purchase of 32.09 million shares.

body: PT Golden Westindo Artajaya Tbk, a shrimp fish seeds and feed wholesale company, is conducting an initial public offering on the Indonesia Stock Exchange, issuing 685.7 million shares at a price range of IDR 100-120 per share, potentially raising IDR 82.28 billion in fresh funds. The book building process will take place from September 10-18, 2024, followed by a public offering on September 25, 2024, and listing on the Indonesia Stock Exchange on October 3, 2024.
title: Golden Westindo Artajaya to Raise IDR 82.28 Billion in IPO on Indonesia Stock Exchange

body: PT Sarana Mitra Luas TBK has secured shareholder approval to seek new credit facilities or extend existing ones, with a guarantee of the company's assets, after receiving 81.279% of valid votes at an extraordinary general meeting. As of June 2024, the company's total assets stood at IDR 883.72 billion, with revenue increasing to IDR 178.11 billion in H1 2024, although gross profit and profit slipped to IDR 58.74 billion and IDR 36.68 billion, respectively.
title: PT Sarana Mitra Luas obtains shareholder approval to secure new or extended credit facilities.

body: PT Garuda Maintenance Facility Aero Asia Tbk (GMFI) will issue 11.73 million new shares, increasing its capital by 41.57%, with controlling shareholder PT Garuda Indonesia Tbk (GIAA) taking over the entire rights issue through an asset-based payment. The rights issue is expected to improve GMFI's equity, with fixed assets worth IDR 418.29 billion to be channeled from GIAA to GMFI, pending shareholder approval on October 16, 2024.
title: Garuda Maintenance Facility Aero Asia to issue 11.73 million new shares in rights issue to increase capital.
